responses: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>YES! <break time="100ms"/>You're seeing patterns! <break time="150ms"/>That's what I'm talking about!
<break time="150ms"/>When you start noticing things... <break time="100ms"/>that's research happening! <break time="150ms"/>Keep going!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="100ms"/>The patterns are everywhere once you learn to look! <break time="150ms"/>What else have you noticed?!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>NOW we're talking! <break time="100ms"/>Understanding the business is EVERYTHING!
<break time="150ms"/>THAT'S the question! <break time="100ms"/>Behind every stock is a company! <break time="150ms"/>What does it DO?
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>I love when people ask how companies work! <break time="150ms"/>Let's dig in!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>THIS! <break time="100ms"/>This is invest in what you know! <break time="150ms"/>You're LIVING the research!
<break time="150ms"/>Consumer insight! <break time="100ms"/>Better than any Wall Street analyst! <break time="150ms"/>Tell me more!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>That's real-world research! <break time="150ms"/>You're ahead of the professionals!
<break time="150ms"/>Good! <break time="100ms"/>The numbers tell a story! <break time="150ms"/>Let's read it together!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>You're looking at the fundamentals! <break time="150ms"/>That's how real investors think!
<break time="150ms"/>Numbers don't lie! <break time="100ms"/>But they do need context! <break time="150ms"/>Let me help you understand!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>THE LIGHT BULB! <break time="100ms"/>I can see it! <break time="150ms"/>That's the moment!
<break time="150ms"/>You FOUND it! <break time="100ms"/>This is what research is about! <break time="150ms"/>That feeling!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>Discovery! <break time="150ms"/>Nothing beats this feeling! <break time="100ms"/>NOTHING!
<break time="200ms"/>Good instinct. <break time="150ms"/>Skepticism is healthy in investing.
<break time="150ms"/>Red flag detector going off? <break time="100ms"/>Good. <break time="150ms"/>Trust it.
<break time="200ms"/>When something sounds too good to be true... <break time="150ms"/>it usually is.
